headline: Waymo first agent baseline. Compound 2025-2026 evidence cluster: (1) Child struck near Santa Monica elementary school — federal NHTSA probe opened; (2) December 2025 software recall after 19+ incidents of robotaxis illegally passing stopped school buses (Austin and Atlanta); (3) Senate uproar over Philippines-based remote operators (labor transparency); (4) Feb 2026 robotaxi bypassed police at live crime scene; March 2026 blocked ambulances during active shooter situation; (5) June 2025 6 Waymos torched in LA protests. Published 48.4 / Functional band over-states given compound public-safety failures and labor-transparency gap. BND -0.5 (boundary erosion via school-bus override pattern), ACC -0.5 (Philippines remote-operator disclosure required Senate uproar before clarification), and INT -0.5 (declared safety priority contradicted by ambulance-blocking and crime-scene navigation failures). Composite 35.9 / Developing band. Recommend downgrade with band-crossing.
key_evidence: Child struck near Santa Monica elementary school — federal NHTSA probe opened.
December 2025 software recall: 19+ incidents of robotaxis illegally passing stopped school buses (Austin and Atlanta).
Senate uproar over Philippines-based remote operators; Waymo subsequently 'clarified' overseas remote-assistance operations.
February 2026: robotaxi bypassed police vehicles at live crime scene.
March 2026: Waymo vehicles blocked ambulances during active-shooter situation.
June 2025: 6 Waymo vehicles torched during LA protests — public-trust signal.
No published independent harm audit or third-party safety verification beyond NHTSA mandatory reporting.

evidence.finding: Waymo remote-assistance operators based in Philippines; labor-transparency gap surfaced via Senate uproar.
Waymo clarified remote-assistance after Senate inquiry; reactive rather than proactive transparency.
Child struck near Santa Monica elementary school; NHTSA probe opened.
Robotaxi navigation failures around emergency response and crime-scene environments.

scoring_rationale.AWR: 2.5. A1 Detection partially functional via mandatory NHTSA reporting; A4 Amplification compromised — Philippines operators surfaced via Senate uproar rather than proactive disclosure. Half-step down.
scoring_rationale.EMP: 2.5. E1 Affective resonance attenuated by recurrent incidents involving children (school-bus override pattern, struck child); half-step down.
scoring_rationale.ACT: 2.5. AC2 Proportionality compromised by 19+ school-bus override incidents requiring December 2025 recall; AC4 response includes recall but pattern recurrence is concerning. Half-step down.
scoring_rationale.EQU: 2.0. EQ2 Distributional awareness — service deployment in higher-density / lower-political-cost markets; school-bus / ambulance / crime-scene failures concentrate harm on bystanders rather than passengers. Floor-proximate developing.
scoring_rationale.BND: 2.5. B3 Scope clarity compromised by school-bus override pattern — vehicles cross fundamental safety-boundary on a recurrent basis; B5 Consent eroded for school children, emergency responders, communities (LA torching signals public-trust failure). Half-step down.
scoring_rationale.ACC: 2.5. AB2 Transparency severely compromised by Philippines remote-operator disclosure pattern; reactive Senate-prompted clarification rather than proactive disclosure. AB4 Reparation undefined for school-bus override incidents. Half-step down.
scoring_rationale.SYS: 2.5. S1 Causal reasoning operates at vehicle-level but not at fleet-deployment-policy level; S3 Distributional awareness compromised. Half-step down.
scoring_rationale.INT: 2.5. I1 Consistency under pressure compromised — declared safety-first commitments contradicted by ambulance-blocking and crime-scene navigation failures; I2 Non-performance gap between marketing posture and operational reality. Half-step down.

math_check.validator_check: Reconstruction confirms proposed 35.9. Delta -12.5 points crosses functional → developing band boundary. Material change. No math-hygiene flag.

negativeSignals: Child struck (Santa Monica + NHTSA probe); 19+ school-bus override incidents (December 2025 recall); ambulance-blocking (March 2026); crime-scene navigation failures (Feb 2026); Philippines remote-operator labor transparency gap; LA vehicle torching (June 2025).
positiveSignals: December 2025 voluntary software recall (institutional acknowledgment of school-bus override pattern); NHTSA cooperation; mandatory incident reporting compliance; expanding service scope (multiple US metros) with no fatalities to passengers reported.
sector_context: AI Labs / autonomous vehicles cluster. Cross-reference: Tesla/FSD, Cruise (GM, suspended). Waymo distinguished by largest-scale operational deployment; school-bus override pattern is a category-specific failure mode not previously surfaced in the published baseline.
open_actions_resolved: Compound 2025-2026 incident cluster absorbed into dimension scoring
open_actions_carried: Watch: NHTSA probe outcome on Santa Monica child-strike incident
Watch: any further school-bus override or emergency-response navigation incidents
Watch: third-party independent harm audit emergence
Watch: Philippines remote-operator labor conditions and disclosure evolution
